# Numeric Prediction and Regression {#ch-regression}

<!-- DEVELOPMENT OUTLINE: original chapter contained only its title. -->

## Prediction with Continuous Outcomes

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/09-numeric-prediction-and-regression.qmd#sec-pr-09-prediction-with-continuous-outcomes)
to turn **Prediction with Continuous Outcomes** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Linear Regression

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/09-numeric-prediction-and-regression.qmd#sec-pr-09-linear-regression)
to turn **Linear Regression** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Loss Functions and Fitting

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/09-numeric-prediction-and-regression.qmd#sec-pr-09-loss-functions-and-fitting)
to turn **Loss Functions and Fitting** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Regularization

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/09-numeric-prediction-and-regression.qmd#sec-pr-09-regularization)
to turn **Regularization** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Nonlinear Regression

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/09-numeric-prediction-and-regression.qmd#sec-pr-09-nonlinear-regression)
to turn **Nonlinear Regression** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Uncertainty and Diagnostics

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/09-numeric-prediction-and-regression.qmd#sec-pr-09-uncertainty-and-diagnostics)
to turn **Uncertainty and Diagnostics** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Summary, Exercises, and Lab
